name: Old-Fashioned Vegetable-Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet, brown the meat in hot oil, cooking it half at a time and draining well.
3. Place potatoes, carrots, onion, celery, frozen beans, tapioca, bouillon, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, salt, and pepper in the crockpot.
4. Stir in the undrained browned meat, tomatoes, and water.
5. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high-heat setting for 5-6 hours.
